result.evidence_summary: Vaskoolihiihto is listed as the 'Gold Pan Skiing' event organized by Lapin Sudet ry in Saariselkä on Good Friday, April 3, 2026, with details on distances, registration, and prizes on a tourism site. It is also mentioned as an annual ski marathon on Good Friday in Saariselkä by a skiing information site. No race results, news articles, or listings in major series like Worldloppet were found.
